have : (fun t => t + a) ⁻¹' s = (fun t => t - a) '' s := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_image]
      constructor
      · intro hx
        use x + a, hx
        simp
      · rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
        simp [hy]
    simp only [NNReal.volume_val]
    rw [this]
    have h_bij : Set.BijOn (fun t => t - a) s ((fun t => t - a) '' s) := by
      constructor
      · exact Set.mapsTo_image _ _
      · constructor
        · intro x hx y hy hxy
          simpa using hxy
        · exact Set.surjOn_image _ _
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_eq_ofReal_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    have : (fun t : ℝ≥0 => t - a) '' s = (fun t : ℝ => t - a) '' (Subtype.val '' s) := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_image, Subtype.exists, NNReal.coe_sub_coe]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨y, ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
      · rintro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
    rw [this]
    rw [Real.volume_image_subtype_val_Iio_of_nonneg (by exact fun _ => NNReal.zero_le_coe)]
    rw [Real.volume_image_subtype_val_Iio_of_nonneg (by exact fun _ => NNReal.zero_le_coe)]
    simp only [ENNReal.toReal_ofReal_eq_iff]
    constructor
    · congr 1
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_image, Subtype.exists, NNReal.coe_sub_coe, Set.mem_Iio]

      · rintro ⟨⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, hx⟩

          constructor
          · exact hs.2 ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
          · simp

    · positivity

    rw [Measure.restrict_apply hs, Set.inter_comm]
    conv_rhs => rw [← Measure.restrict_univ (μ := volume)]

    simp only [Set.univ_inter]
    have : Set.Ici a ∩ s = (fun t => t + a) '' ((fun t => t - a) '' (Set.Ici a ∩ s)) := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ici, Set.mem_image]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨ha, hs⟩
        use x - a
        constructor
        · use x
          exact ⟨⟨ha, hs⟩, rfl⟩
        · exact tsub_add_cancel_of_le ha
      · rintro ⟨y, ⟨z, ⟨hz1, hz2⟩, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
        simp only [tsub_add_cancel_of_le hz1]
        exact ⟨hz1, hz2⟩
    rw [this]
    have hInter : (fun t : ℝ≥0 => t - a) '' (Set.Ici a ∩ s) = Set.univ ∩ ((fun t => t - a) '' s) := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ici, Set.mem_univ, true_and]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨y, ⟨_, hy2⟩, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨y, hy2, rfl⟩
      · rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
        use max y a
        constructor
        · constructor
          · exact le_max_right y a
          · by_cases h : a ≤ y
            · simp [max_eq_left h, hy]
            · push_neg at h
              simp only [max_eq_right h.le]
              sorry
        · by_cases h : a ≤ y
          · simp [max_eq_left h]
          · push_neg at h
            simp [max_eq_right h.le]
    sorry

rw [Measure.restrict_apply hs, Measure.restrict_apply (measurable_id'.add_const a hs)]
    have : (fun t => t + a) ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.univ = (fun t => t + a) ⁻¹' s := Set.inter_univ _
    rw [this]
    have : s ∩ Set.Ici a = (fun t => t + a) '' ((fun t => t + a) ⁻¹' s) := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ici, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_preimage]
      constructor
      · intro ⟨hxs, hxa⟩
        use x - a
        simp only [tsub_add_cancel_of_le hxa, hxs, and_self]
      · rintro ⟨y, hys, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨hys, le_add_self⟩
    rw [this]
    exact h.measure_image (measurable_id'.add_const a hs.preimage (measurable_id'.add_const a)) |>.symm

· rintro ⟨y, hys, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨hys, le_add_self⟩

      · intro x y hxy

        omega
